goals.description: Complete the final 40% of midterm review to secure a sense of completion and protect my self-worth before tomorrow's exam.
goals.rationale: My long planning horizon tells me that finishing this now is the only way to preserve the mental stability required to be present for everyone tomorrow. If I don't, the cognitive dissonance will fracture my focus, making me feel like a failure in front of myself and my cohort.

goals.description: Send a gentle, non-confrontational text to Mina explaining that I need quiet time tonight to study, framing it as 'protecting our group dynamic' rather than rejecting her personally.
goals.rationale: I cannot handle the guilt of choosing friends over myself again, nor can I risk a confrontation if she presses me later. Defer this until right before I start studying so I can execute the message without emotional friction, ensuring I don't ruin the evening's peace or invite conflict.

goals.rationale: My high value on relationships (0.5) means I must not let this fester, but my conflict-avoidant nature makes immediate confrontation difficult right now. Defer until after the study block so I have the energy to be kind but firm, ensuring they don't feel rejected while preserving my own boundaries.
